name: DELUXE CORP
business: Deluxe Corporation is a Payments and Data company serving small and medium-sized businesses, financial institutions, and large consumer brands. It operates through four segments: Merchant Services (payment processing), B2B Payments (treasury management), Data Solutions (data-driven marketing), and Print (checks and business forms).

exposures.sentence: We have transformed into a trusted Payments and Data company, serving small and medium-sized businesses, financial institutions, and some of the world's largest consumer brands.

Integrated accounts payable disbursements, including eChecks, as well as Deluxe Payment Exchange, including digital and print and mail payments, also Medical Payment Exchange and fraud and security services
Artificial intelligence (AI) is being deployed in targeted areas where it can deliver measurable value.

catalysts.event: Sale of certain assets and liabilities related to the small business distributor channel in Print segment
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we entered into an agreement to sell certain assets and liabilities related to the small business distributor channel in our Print segment for approximately $25.0 million, with approximately half paid at closing and the remainder due over the next three years.

catalysts.event: Completion of employee reductions associated with restructuring and integration accruals
catalysts.sentence: The majority of the employee reductions associated with our restructuring and integration accruals as of December 31, 2025, and the related severance payments, are expected to be completed in mid-2026.
